message: Fix video autoplay: include '-thumb' in autoplay detection and ensure muted attribute
Cleanup video thumbnails: remove controls from autoplaying preview videos
Optimize initial load performance: lazy-load videos and stagger GLB initialization
Unify play button hover thickness with site buttons and links (2px design)
Enhance YouTube support: added shorts compatibility and robust chained thumbnail fallbacks
Fix video aspect ratios and YouTube thumbnail cropping in galleries
perf: Add passive option to touchmove event listener and remove extraneous blank lines in index.html.
feat(media): Restore complete aspect-ratio flexibility for all video/embed formats
style(media): Update YouTube and video embed wrappers to 16:9 aspect ratio and 100% width.
perf: Add passive option to touchmove event listener for improved scrolling performance.
fix(media): Remove maxresdefault.jpg probing to prevent 404 network errors, relying exclusively on hqdefault.jpg to match the 4:3 container perfectly.
fix(media): Replace URL-based 404 YouTube fallback check with dataset flags to prevent cross-origin issues.
fix(perf): Add passive flag to global scroll listeners
fix: Fixed YouTube glassmorphic player syntax and fallback logic.
fix: Allow captions to include parentheses by removing the redundant markdown link exclusion.
feat: Generate virtual collection cards for implicit sub-path categories in hierarchical navigation, borrowing cover images from descendants.
Refactor: Remove hardware acceleration CSS from cards and update image sizing and border-radius in media containers.
style: Enhance rendering performance and clipping consistency for embedded content and gallery items by adding mask-image, transform: translateZ(0), and adjusting border-radius inheritance.
feat: improve Strava embed rendering and ID parsing, and refine full-width image margins.
Media Sync: Add 1771695052486.png
style: Improve centering for media elements and enhance Strava embed UI with new icons and text.
feat: Add `overflow: hidden` to cards and style Strava embed placeholders.
feat: improve Strava embed detection and rendering, enhance multi-line media block parsing, and update card navigation.
feat: Add support for embedding Strava activities with dynamic script loading.
style: Add responsive padding for article view and adjust media wrapper margins for smaller screens.
feat: Introduce `unified-media-wrapper` class and apply it to single media items for consistent block spacing.
fix: Adjust responsive styling for gallery item widths, layout gaps, and gallery spacing on small screens.
refactor: Remove custom scroll restoration logic and always scroll to top on navigation (except for swipes).
Style: Update `.layout-quote` properties by adjusting margin, padding, and max-width.
feat: Hide footer with `display: none` and separate `pointer-events` for main header when search is active.
feat: Fully hide the main app content when search is active, automatically close search before navigation, and refine card rendering conditions.
feat: Expand `_resetHaptic` function to clear additional scroll and input state variables.
feat: Implement scroll position restoration when navigating between pages using a scroll memory map.
fix: update "About" link to be an anchor link.
refactor: Remove `_isNavSwiping` flag, overscroll bubbling logic, and gesture protection for GLB model loading.
feat: Implement overscroll bubbling for navigation swipes and defer 3D model loading during active swipes to prevent touchcancel issues.
Fix global swipe behavior by disabling it on main category pages when no subnav item is active.
fix: Update touch event ignore conditions for fullscreen model viewers and iframes, and refine scrollable navigation row selection to include only those with actual overflow.
refactor: Remove double `requestAnimationFrame` for scroll positioning and ensure row visibility before measurement.
feat: Implement experimental global horizontal swipe functionality for subnavigation.
fix: manage OrbitControls enabled state and canvas touch-action for improved mobile interaction.
fix: Enforce highp WebGL precision to ensure accurate PBR reflections and prevent visual artifacts.
Refine GLB viewer controls by explicitly enabling rotation, implementing mobile-specific pan/rotate logic, and adjusting lighting intensity.
feat: Add `HemisphereLight` to `RoomEnvironment`, adjust a `DirectionalLight` intensity, and refine `OrbitControls` panning logic for mobile devices.
Refactor scroll event handling to accurately distinguish user-initiated scrolls from programmatic ones, removing `_autoScroll` logic and introducing `_isValidUserScroll` with input tracking.
fix: prevent phantom sub-link selections from programmatic DOM mutations by introducing auto-scroll flags and timeouts.
Refactor scroll handling to prevent conflicts between programmatic and user scrolls by introducing an `_autoScroll` flag and removing the `userTouching` state.
Refactor: update color palette variables, remove unused styles, and refine link and chip styling.
style: remove ease timing function from button transition property.
style: Remove `var(--ease)` from CSS transition property.
Fix: Adjust `--sub-row-h` and `--main-row-h` CSS variables to `20px`.
style: switch article headings to rem-based margins for uniform spacing
style: switch article headings to em-based margins
chore: Restore stable rendering logic and synchronize pipeline flags
Refactor: Prune dead code, decouple internal functions, and fix card rendering logic
Refactor: Consolidation of repetitive CSS and JS to improve elegance and reduce line count
fix: Adjust dice icon size and position by updating its margins, width, and height.
feat: implement path-to-URL conversion to handle spaces by replacing them with underscores.
Fix: Prevent programmatic scrolls from triggering user-initiated navigation logic by refining scroll event detection and resetting scroll position.
refactor: remove custom mobile viewport gesture proxy and app transition effects, and refine navigation centering logic.
Fix: Update dynamic scroll baseline to prevent jumps when row is reset by navigation.
fix: Improve nav row centering by instantly disabling snap-scrolling and resetting position, then re-enabling snapping after centering.
feat: Implement mobile viewport gesture proxy for horizontal navigation scrolling on mobile devices.
feat: Add pointer cursor to picker rows and authoritatively track user interaction during scrolling.
refactor: Remove `scroll-snap-stop: always` from sub-link navigation.
fix: Move picker lock release to execute only when the finger is lifted to prevent veering off.
feat: Improve navigation picker's scroll snapping to ensure item selection, refine centering, and optimize scroll settling for a more responsive feel.
feat: Enhance navigation picker layout, spacing, and scrolling behavior with updated CSS variables, mask images, and refined JavaScript logic.
fix: Improve touch interaction by disabling user selection, setting touch action, and increasing row gap to prevent touch bleed.
feat: Enhance navigation UX by increasing row heights and spacing, removing mask-image, and optimizing scroll-based navigation for snappier responses.
refactor: Adjust scroll reset logic to instantly center active items or midpoint instead of forcing to leftmost.
Refactor CSS by removing global overscroll and body transition styles, adjusting navigation scroll behavior and snap type, adding pointer-events to nav arrows, and simplifying scroll detection logic.
feat: Disable overscroll behavior globally and for horizontal tag lists.
refactor: streamline navigation centering logic with `isSubNav` parameter and remove explicit scroll position reset.
perf: Optimize navigation dwell time for initial and subsequent page loads and add a fallback title to Umami tracking.
fix: Standardize navigation row initial scroll position, reset scroll before content updates, and ensure correct centering behavior, especially after state restoration.
feat: Implement exclusive rendering mode for fullscreen models and adjust OrbitControls damping factor.
feat: Adjust card rotation base speed for card mode from 0.0008 to 0.0010.
feat: Improve fullscreen experience by repositioning and restyling the button, optimizing rendering, and capping resolution for performance.
feat: Implement a new 'Jewelry Store' lighting rig with adjusted tone mapping exposure and reposition the fullscreen button.
feat: Improve 3D scene lighting by generating per-renderer environment maps, increasing light intensities, and disposing of environment textures during cleanup.
feat: Improve rendering performance by capping pixel ratio at 2.0, prioritizing fullscreen viewer updates, and enabling damping for OrbitControls.
feat: Introduce unified media entrance animations with skeleton fade-out and improve 3D model lighting consistency across devices.
refactor: specify CSS transition properties for background and border-color.
Refactor element centering from flex to grid, add overflow hidden, and normalize inner element display and margin.
feat: Enhance model viewer fullscreen experience by removing card framing and adjusting fullscreen button position for mobile accessibility.
style: Update skeleton and model viewer backgrounds for contrast, remove fullscreen button shadows and hover effects, and increase Three.js lighting intensities.
style: Adjust skeleton and model viewer backgrounds for better contrast, remove button shadows and hover effects, and increase Three.js light intensities to prevent black metals.
feat: Enhance fullscreen button styling and add specific adjustments for fullscreen mode.
perf: Optimize 3D model viewer loading and rendering by matching backgrounds, adding loading text, and disabling WebGL alpha for stability.
fix: Prevent GLB viewer flickering and improve theme-aware clear color handling by adjusting backgrounds and removing the `renderGLBViewer` helper.
feat: Add `renderGLBViewer` function with supporting CSS for dynamic GLB model embedding.
Remove iframe embedding logic, universal transformer, and compact sizing for embeds.
feat: Add compact sizing for Spotify and Strava embeds, and extend media detection to include HTML, Lichess, and Strava URLs.
feat: Enhance content block parsing to intelligently detect and separate button and media blocks, and add autoplay and controls to video elements.
feat: Add universal embed transformer, raw iframe support, and refine video styling.

feat: Enhance text layout and readability by increasing paragraph spacing in hero and text sections, simplifying hero link selectors, and enabling `
` tag rendering in markdown.
feat: Add WebGL context loss recovery, defer cached model setup, and implement a loading safety net.
refactor: improve 3D model viewer initialization, entrance triggering, and add explicit WebGL context disposal.
Perf: Simplify GLB loader queue processing by removing `requestIdleCallback` and refine overlay styling for improved performance.
Refactor: Improve 3D viewer cleanup by relocating its execution and adding logic to flush orphaned GLB initialization queue items.
feat: Implement WebGL context cleanup for 3D viewers, enhance GLB loader styling and loading fidelity, and add error handling to the GLB queue.
Remove unused CSS animations and 3D loader icon, adjust GLB observer pre-load margin, and fix markdown italic parsing.
feat: Implement 3D model loading UI with asset caching and improved parallel loading for GLB viewers.
feat: Optimize rendering for mobile devices by conditionally lowering pixel ratio and using an analytic lighting rig.
refactor: explicitly set instant scroll behavior using `window.scrollTo` options object.
refactor: Generate environment maps per-renderer from a shared RoomEnvironment scene due to WebGL context limitations.
feat: Adjust Three.js tone mapping exposure, environment intensity, and accent light strengths for enhanced scene lighting.
Remove specific touch control configurations for the viewer.
style: Refine 3D scene lighting and rendering parameters for improved saturation and contrast, and remove specific touch control settings.
feat: Adjust OrbitControls zoom, pan, and touch gestures, enabling them in fullscreen and disabling by default.
refactor: Standardize OrbitControls to consistently enable panning and define two-finger touch for panning.
feat: Prevent input trapping by conditionally disabling OrbitControls pan for touch devices and removing a touch gesture override.
feat: Enable pan control and configure two-finger touch for panning.
feat: Dynamically enable pan control for 3D viewers in fullscreen and disable it in inline mode.
feat: Implement a shared environment map, adjust hemisphere light intensity, refine OrbitControls for input devices, and remove redundant FPS limit and model property.
refactor: Simplify header behavior to sticky positioning, remove complex scroll animations, and clean up unused styles and animations.
feat: Gate 3D model entrance animation on first render and delay loader overlay removal.
refactor: Dynamically adjust body padding-top using a ResizeObserver on the header for frame-synced updates, removing old padding transition logic.
perf: Enhance GLB processing compatibility with `requestIdleCallback` fallbacks and relax `IntersectionObserver` threshold.
feat: Gate model entrance animation to trigger only when fully loaded and visible, and adjust visibility observer threshold.
style: Remove shimmer animations from skeleton loaders, update their display properties, add box-shadows to hover effects, and refine the skeleton hero layout.
feat: Add SARIT video thumbnail (non-looping).
feat: Add SARIT and Honda thumbnail videos to assets.
feat: Implement vibrant studio lighting for 3D scenes, refine model rotation for a professional feel, and add new video thumbnails.
feat: Add SARIT thumbnail video asset.
feat: Add Honda and SARIT video thumbnails and remove a file.
feat: Add support for videos to conditionally disable looping if their URL contains "-noloop".
Add files via upload
Create temp
Delete assets/videos
Create videos
style: Increase font size for specific UI elements from 13px to 15px.
refactor: Refine content block parsing for flexible media and caption syntax, and improve hierarchical page discovery.
feat: Enhance GLB viewer stability and rendering precision with theme-aware clear colors, delayed fullscreen resize, and refined camera and model fitting.
refactor: Introduce `.card-info` to standardize card content padding and layout, and adjust card title styling.
refactor: Standardize media aspect ratios to 4/3 across cards and galleries, and remove image analysis and inversion logic.
Delete assets/images/resume-thumb.jpg
feat: add loading skeletons for images, videos, and YouTube embeds.
feat: Enhance content parsing for resume, galleries, buttons, and grids; remove image grayscale filters; and add `guide.md`.
fix: Reset auto-rotate angle to 0 for Z-up models.
feat: Implement responsive GLB viewer resizing and reframing with adjusted initial model orientation.
feat: Add conditional Z-up to Y-up orientation correction for GLB models based on filename.
Rename Quardin-Trophy.glb to Quardin-Trophy-Z-up.glb
feat: Add a loading overlay to model viewers that is removed after the entrance animation.
feat: update the fullscreen exit icon SVG path.
feat: Implement DRACOLoader for GLTF models, add styling for quote skeleton, and wrap YouTube embeds in `row-media`.
Rename Gripper_Subassembly.glb to Gripper-Subassembly.glb
Delete .agent/rules directory
feat: adjust tone mapping exposure and light intensities to prevent white blowout and soften scene lighting.
feat: Implement PBR lighting with shadows and refined 3D model auto-rotation interaction.
feat: Enhance 3D viewer performance and appearance by optimizing GLB queue processing, unifying camera and scaling, enabling zoom, implementing manual rotation, and applying texture filtering.
feat: Implement lazy-loaded 3D GLB model viewers with fullscreen support and enhance media extraction for various media types.
feat: move theme initialization to head, refine initial transition handling, add GLB entrance animations, and simplify article media display logic.
refactor: Use `entry.Thumbnail` instead of `entry.Media` for media assignment in card rendering.
feat: Implement light mode theme, refine CSS variables, and adjust link styling and header control positioning.
feat: Add support for displaying video files in media rows and containers with updated styling and extraction logic.
Refactor: Remove unused resume skill rendering and media detection functions, and refine skeleton loading and dice icon styles.
refactor: Simplify Umami analytics tracking by removing heartbeat and event abstraction, and add category-specific hover colors for card titles.
refactor: Standardize Umami tracking paths to use hash-prefixed URLs and ensure heartbeat starts on page load.
refactor: Unify and expand analytics tracking with a universal click handler, standardized event names, and streamlined calls.
feat: Implement robust SPA analytics with dwell time tracking and heartbeat events for Umami.
fix: Update social media image meta tags to use standard filenames.
feat: Add Twitter meta tags for enhanced social media sharing.
feat: Add logic to force 'quote' section type for specific titles and prevent 'hero' default override.
feat: Add support for "{random quote}" as a valid title for random quote sections.
feat: Add haptic feedback to refresh button and remove automatic random quote display from personal view.
refactor: Add haptic feedback throttling and remove the user activation check.
Refactor: move `_resetHaptic()` call to only execute on full re-renders.
feat: Improve swipe navigation responsiveness with instant visual updates, optimized rendering, and refined haptic feedback.
feat: extend click haptic feedback to additional interactive elements including those with `role="button"` and specific classes.
Refactor: Optimize page rendering with debounced content updates and CSS-driven navigation row visibility.
feat: Implement a tiered haptic feedback system with distinct vibrations for scroll boundaries and click interactions.
Refactor CSS hover effects to use `@media (hover: hover)` queries, adjust icon button sizing, and streamline navigation active states and category color definitions.
feat: instantly render sub-navigation during page switches
feat: Improve touch device navigation hover/active states, instantly render content on swipe, and activate the brand name on the home page.
Refine touch device CSS by removing `!important` from hover states and allowing transitions for active states, including `fill-anim-mask` selectors.
feat: Restore active state styling for navigation links and buttons to provide tap feedback.
feat: Add slide-in animation for deep-level navigation row updates.
refactor: Reduce haptic feedback durations for various UI interactions.
Refine header spacing variables and brand text margin for improved visual alignment.
feat: implement touch device hover fixes and improve scroll animation smoothness with requestAnimationFrame.
perf: Optimize navigation row updates by directly modifying link classes, broaden haptic feedback priming to multiple interaction types, and add scroll tolerance to haptic scroll detection.
refactor: simplify navigation rendering, haptic scroll, and CSS, updating scroll snap behavior from mandatory to proximity.
perf: Debounce history API updates and refine scroll-end detection for smoother navigation, and add responsive header styling.
fix: Improve navigation active state handling, optimize rendering, and robustify haptic feedback.
feat: Enhance navigation active state application for mobile and refactor page rendering to use specific functions for Resume and Index.
feat: Adjust navigation active state application and padding updates for picker scrolling, and ensure navigation renders on page changes.
Delay `renderNavigation` execution until after scroll completion and only for non-Home pages.
Fix: Prevent unnecessary picker row DOM updates and ensure navigation rendering after page changes.
feat: Expand vibration API priming to cover a wider range of user activation events.
fix: Prevent picker wobble and improve active link transition handling during scroll.
refactor: Enhance vibration API priming with multiple activation layers and remove redundant priming calls.
Refactor: simplify scroll state tracking, prime vibration API on touch, and update page navigation to use history.replaceState for silent URL updates.
feat: Improve navigation active state transitions and refine haptic feedback by priming the vibration API, adjusting durations, and resetting scroll state.
refactor: track the specific picker row being scrolled instead of a global boolean state.
feat: Enable instant navigation during haptic scroll and refactor navigation rendering and keydown handler for improved readability.
Refactor haptic feedback system to be touch-gated during scroll and implement tiered intensity for click interactions.
feat: Add live visual feedback for active items on scroll, reduce scroll end delay, and expand haptic feedback triggers.
feat: Add global haptic feedback on interactive element clicks and refine navigation scroll haptics with auto-navigation on settle.
feat: Add scroll snapping to navigation, suppress haptic feedback during programmatic scrolls, and reduce haptic vibration duration.
Refactor: Always center navigation rows on resize and increment header top padding.
feat: Introduce haptic scroll feedback for sub-navigation rows and adjust various CSS spacing variables.
refactor: optimize header and mobile layout by adjusting spacing variables and removing redundant CSS.
refactor: Refactor header styling with new CSS variables for improved responsiveness and update scroll/resize event listeners for performance.
refactor: Enhance header layout and responsiveness using CSS variables and restrict navigation centering to mobile.
style: Add top and bottom padding to a layout element to match quote spacing.
Remove mobile search scroll fix and search results styling, and update search overlay background opacity to 1 while removing `backdrop-filter`.
feat: Implement mobile scroll fix for search results and enhance placeholder text legibility.
style: remove search trigger wrapper prominence styling.
style: Enhance search overlay and trigger styling, remove global blur, and refine search dismissal logic.
refactor: Adjust button styling and standardize grid layout properties for improved visual consistency.
feat: implement quote shuffle bag logic and refactor `renderQuoteCard` for improved quote selection.
Refactor: Standardize component spacing, update chip styles, and introduce category-based heading colors.
refactor: Update placeholder card gradients, text styles, and hover transitions for a refined visual appearance.
feat: Enhance placeholder card styling with a smoother gradient, a new hover overlay, and refined text transitions.
feat: Implement inline markdown for buttons, allow grouping of multiple buttons, and update button wrapper styles for better layout.
refactor: extract card rendering and chip rendering logic into new `renderCardHTML` and `renderChip` functions.
feat: Introduce CTA button and markdown grid styles, update link styling to exclude new buttons, and refine child page rendering logic.
feat: Generate placeholder text from a cleaned entry title and refine its CSS styling.
chore: Simplify page title.
feat: Add support for non-link text in the footer, improve link parsing, and include dynamic year replacement with updated styling.
feat: Implement shimmer loading effect and refine various CSS styles for layout and variable consistency.
style: Add `--op-line` CSS variable and apply it to text decoration colors for consistent styling.
refactor: update CSS color palette to use RGB components and opacity variables for improved theming.
refactor: Remove demo mode, implement stale-while-revalidate cache strategy, and refactor `renderRows` function for enhanced content rendering.
style: remove `cursor: pointer` and `position: relative` CSS properties.
Refactor `renderResume` to dynamically render all resume sections using `SectionType` and introduce `formatSectionTitle`.
style: Remove text-decoration-color from link transitions.
refactor: update checkbox list item styling to use absolute positioning and include resume entries, and remove the `processText` function.
feat: Refactor media gallery and embedding styles for improved responsiveness and uniform height.
feat: Refine search control positioning and icon sizing, simplify chip button styles, and adjust 3D model auto-rotation behavior.
Refactor link, chip, blockquote, and list styling, adjust layout max-widths, and enable desktop model viewer interaction.
chore: Remove fullscreen exit event tracking.
Remove passive analytics tracking for page views, scroll depth, and GLB model loads, clarifying that `trackEvent` is for intentional user actions only.

Style search overlay with full border-radius, hide search input cancel button, and adjust search close behavior on Backspace key.
feat: Introduce CSS variables for spacing, border-radius, and animation durations, and apply new global link styling.
